title: sambucus nigra f. heterophylla
intro: Sambucus nigra f. heterophylla, also known as elderflower, is a variation of the elderberry plant, characterized by its distinct leaf shape and growth patterns. The medicinal properties of Sambucus nigra f. heterophylla lie in its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenes, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is known to offer several health benefits, including relieving cold and flu symptoms, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Sambucus nigra f. heterophylla is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or syrup, and is also used in herbal infusions and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
